chapter_title: Jefferson & Orange Cnty. Pilots Licensing and Regul. Act
text: The board may not change pilotage rates before the first anniversary of the preceding rate change.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 4
### Chapter 69. Jefferson & Orange Cnty. Pilots Licensing and Regul. Act
##### § 69.061 — Pilotage Rate Change

The board may not change pilotage rates before the first anniversary of the preceding rate change.

*Added by Acts 2003, 78th Leg., ch. 745, Sec. 1, eff. June 20, 2003.*

subsections.text: The board may not change pilotage rates before the first anniversary of the preceding rate change.

history.raw: Added by Acts 2003, 78th Leg., ch. 745, Sec. 1, eff. June 20, 2003.
